# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

# Checklist

- [ ] Frontend behavior was reviewed against the data-source and mock rules.
- [ ] Lint, typecheck, tests, and build were run successfully.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or hardcoded environment values were introduced.
- [ ] UI changes preserve the existing shell, theme, and `data-cy` hooks.
- [ ] Translation or metadata changes were updated when needed.
